title: Add email validation to user registration
description:
Repository: https://github.com/MuhammedSenn/demo-user-service-python
Branch: main

Requirement:
Add email format validation to register_user in registration.py. Raise ValueError with message 'Invalid email format' when the email is invalid.

Acceptance Criteria:
- Invalid email raises ValueError
- Existing valid registration keeps working
- Add or update unit tests
